pi_items.source: Task description states: 'A Tracked Entity Attribute named Mother Registration ID'
Task description states: 'A Relationship Type named Mother-Child'

DHIS2 documentation confirms TEXT is a valid ValueType for tracked entity attributes. Web search results from DHIS2 JavaDoc API (ValueType enum) and metadata documentation confirm TEXT is supported as a value type in DHIS2. Task description requires 'Value Type Text'.

DHIS2 Relationship model documentation (https://docs.dhis2.org/en/use/user-guides/dhis-core-version-240/understanding-the-data-model/relationship-model.html) confirms that 'Person' is the standard tracked entity type used for Mother-Child relationships. Task description explicitly requires constraints to be 'the Person Tracked Entity Type'.

privileged_info_summary: The task mch_tracker_relationship_setup@1 targets the DHIS2 2.40 Sierra Leone demo database (official non-synthetic reference data from https://databases.dhis2.org/sierra-leone/2.40/). The task requires creating a Tracked Entity Attribute named 'Mother Registration ID' with Value Type 'TEXT' and Searchable flag enabled, plus a Relationship Type named 'Mother-Child' with both constraints set to the 'Person' tracked entity type. All metadata claims are verified against DHIS2 2.40 API specifications: TEXT is a supported ValueType enum constant, and Person is the standard tracked entity type for Mother-Child relationships as documented in official DHIS2 relationship model documentation.
